message:
feat(tests): add 18 property tests for compaction and provider_metadata

8 proptests for compaction (token calculation, threshold, file ops, set algebra)
10 proptests for provider_metadata (serde roundtrips, case insensitivity, alias
resolution, env var validation, routing defaults consistency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
